properties.examiner: French judicial authority / DGA Toulouse; confirmed from MH370 on 3 September 2015

properties.desc: Right flaperon (Boeing 777 part 657BB), found 2015-07-29 at Saint-Andre, Reunion Island (France) by Johnny Begue (municipal beach-cleaning team). Official identification status: confirmed.
